message.content:
@startuml
title Retrieve Part value

actor User

box "driftd service" #lightblue
participant "libdrift" as libdrift
participant "Advertisement channel" as advchan
participant "Control channel" as ctrlchan
participant "driftd" as driftd
end box

participant "Neo4j" as neo4j
participant "MongoDB" as mongodb

User -> libdrift : get Part value

note left of libdrift
Retrieval message contains
index specifier
index value
end note

libdrift -> advchan : send retrieval message
libdrift <-- advchan : ACK

advchan -> driftd : get Part value

driftd -> driftd : Lookup Part UUID in index
driftd -> neo4j : Get Part info

alt [Composite Part]
  loop [foreach Part]
    driftd -> neo4j : Get Part metadata with UUID
    driftd -> mongodb : Get Part values
  end
else [Simple Part]
  driftd -> neo4j : Get Part metadata with UUID
  driftd -> mongodb : Get Part values
end

driftd -> driftd : build update message
advchan <-- driftd : Update messages for Part values
libdrift <-- advchan : receive update message

@enduml
